tags.name: Schluchtensattel
tags.note: Alpine Club Guide, Flaig 1977 and Seibert 2008, describe Schluchtensattel ~1955 m and to be located near (SW) P. 1978. However, fingerpost at end of ascend from Damülser Furka claims "Schluchtensattel 1987 m".

tags.name: Schluchtensattel
tags.note: Not really a saddle with elevation to north only about 1 m higher. Alpine Club Guide, Flaig 1977 and Seibert 2008, describe Schluchtensattel ~1955 m to be located near (SW) P. 1978. However, fingerpost at this location claims "Schluchtensattel 1987 m".
